inputs.label: Maximum Signal Frequency
inputs.businessContext: The highest frequency component expected in the signal to be sampled or analyzed.

businessContext_i18n.en: The highest frequency component expected in the signal to be sampled or analyzed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örneklenen veya analiz edilen sinyalde beklenen en yüksek frekans bileşeni.

inputs.label: Sampling Frequency
inputs.businessContext: The rate at which the data acquisition system samples the signal.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate at which the data acquisition system samples the signal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri toplama sisteminin sinyali örnekleme hızı.

inputs.label: Safety Margin Factor
inputs.businessContext: Engineering safety factor to provide a margin against aliasing; typically 1.2 to 2.0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Engineering safety factor to provide a margin against aliasing; typically 1.2 to 2.0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örtüşmeye karşı marj sağlayan mühendislik güvenlik faktörü; tipik olarak 1,2 ila 2,0.

inputs.label: Desired Nyquist Utilization
inputs.businessContext: The target percentage of the Nyquist frequency that the maximum signal frequency should occupy for optimal setup.

businessContext_i18n.en: The target percentage of the Nyquist frequency that the maximum signal frequency should occupy for optimal setup.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Optimum kurulum için maksimum sinyal frekansının Nyquist frekansının yüzde kaçını kaplaması gerektiğini gösteren hedef yüzde.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
